Recognition

Awarded at Europe's Leading Innovation Fairs

🥇 Gold Medal — INTARG 2025
18th International Invention & Innovation Contest · Poland
Awarded by the Ministry of Economic Development and Technology of Poland and WIPO for the invention of the PIAP X550 Autonomous Mobile Robot.
🥇 Gold Medal MTP — MODERNLOG 2025
Targi Logistyki, Magazynowania i Transportu · MTP Grupa · Poznań, 3–5 June 2025
Gold Medal awarded by the Competition Jury chaired by Prof. Michał Wieczorowski (Poznań University of Technology) at Poland's premier logistics and warehousing trade fair.

Deployment Domains

Built for Environments Where Failure Is Not an Option

From automated warehouses to classified facilities — the X550 adapts to the operational environment, not the other way around. Based on the Siemens Simove standardized platform.

AMR Fleet
Warehousing & Logistics
Autonomous Euro-pallet transport in warehouses and distribution centers. Built on the Siemens Simove platform — proven components, minimal TCO.
500kgpayload
navigation
24/7operation
Inter-op
Manufacturing & Assembly
Autonomous transport between production lines. Seamless integration with MES/SCADA systems. PLC control architecture.

Cargo and baggage transport on aprons, ground support logistics, airside operations. Engaged by PGL (Polska Grupa Lotnicza) for AMR integration.

Core Technology

Polish Engineering. European Standards.
Autonomy powered by FIMIK

Designed and manufactured at Łukasiewicz–PIAP — one of Poland's leading robotics research institutes with over 50 years of operational experience. The X550 is built on the Siemens Simove standardized platform, using widely adopted industrial components for lower lifetime operating costs and maximum configuration flexibility.

  • 01
    Autonomous Navigation
    Natural Features Navigation (NFN) via Simove ANS+ by Siemens. No floor markers required. SICK laser scanners for environment mapping.
  • 02
    Fleet Management
    Simove Master Control by Siemens. Centralized traffic management, task scheduling, and real-time telemetry across the entire AMR fleet.
  • 03
    Industrial Control
    Siemens S7-1500 PLC series with industrial computers. IWLAN (WiFi) wireless network. Manual override capability.
  • 04
    Cybersecurity-Ready
    Encrypted communications, secure boot, and network segmentation options for deployment in classified or sensitive environments.
  • 05
    Modular Payload System
    Configurable interface for custom tooling — robotic arms, inspection sensors, CBRN detectors, or mission-specific modules.
Strategic Partnership

Open for Collaboration

Joint Development
Co-develop mission-specific variants, payload systems, or market adaptations.
Localization & Integration
Regional manufacturing, certification support, and local system integration partnerships.
Technology Transfer
Licensing of navigation software, hardware architectures, and safety-certified subsystems.
Strategic Cooperation
Market-entry support, EU funding projects (Horizon Europe, EDF), and consortium participation.

Łukasiewicz–PIAP brings five decades of robotics expertise and an active role in European research programs — a trusted partner for organizations that cannot afford unproven technology.

CE Certified Horizon Europe EDF Participant NATO-compatible ISO 13482 Siemens Simove ANS+ Siemens Simove
